title: AI Flywheel Visualization
description: An interactive flywheel infographic showing how chatbot usage, feedback data, better models, and user satisfaction reinforce each other with growing momentum over time.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

learningObjectives: Explain how usage, feedback, model quality, and satisfaction reinforce each other
Describe why an improvement flywheel accelerates as data compounds
educational.prerequisites: Basic understanding of chatbot feedback signals

pedagogical.instructionalStrategy: Interactive infographic with hover metrics and click case studies
pedagogical.assessment: Students identify the bottleneck quadrant for a new bot and the action that breaks it
